creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #1)
Maybe not as our systems usually have more than enough disk space. Still, I think it would be better if the Makefile displays a value closer to the truth.

It would also be nice if the port is updated to the newest Chromium. 61.* has a number of security bugs.
